title: IdentifyCall
description: An identify call associates a user with their traits.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user in your database.

anonymousId.description: A pseudo-unique substitute for a user ID for cases when you do not have an absolutely unique identifier.

traits.description: Free-form dictionary of traits of the user, like email or name.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date string when the message was originally sent.

messageId.description: Unique identifier for the message to deduplicate.
